title: Doctor note
description: What the doctor observed today, plus what should happen next.

fields.label: Note (observations / assessment)
fields.helpText: Bullet list of what the doctor observed, assessed, or discussed today. One fact per bullet. Use **bold** sub-headings (e.g. **Symptoms**, **Examination**, **Negatives**) when there are more than 6 bullets.

fields.label: Plan
fields.helpText: Bullet list of next-step actions: medications to start / stop / adjust, investigations to order, follow-up timing, escalation triggers. Leave empty if the doctor gave only observations and no plan.
